insider_tx.person: Ms. Sabene Saigol (Spouse of Mr Sayeed Tariq Saigol)

patterns.name: Ascending Triangle
patterns.note: Flat resistance with rising lows; bullish breakout bias.

earnings_basis_divergence.interpretation: Standalone (unconsolidated) EPS for 2025 is 48% ABOVE the consolidated figure — typically a non-recurring parent-level gain or subsidiary dividends. Treat the unconsolidated EPS and any P/E derived from it with caution; the consolidated basis is more conservative.
